title: WCAG 2.1 AA Accessibility
description: Added to all 11 files: skip-nav link, *:focus-visible outline, prefers-reduced-motion (disables all animations), keyboard nav (arrow keys on tablists, Escape closes modals), .sr-only utility, scope='col' on table headers. Supersedes TKT-253.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.

2026-02-28T12:00:00Z.detail: Implemented as part of StatsLedge UX Overhaul (TKT-267 through TKT-280). All 20 QA checks pass.
